texto: Face it, Jorlan, we are the lesser sex. That is why our name-givers take care of us. Left alone, we would fall to ruin. We are intellectually inferior. Left unmonitored, our innate male aggression would destroy this world.
explicacao: Citação de Dara Joy sobre temas ligados a amor. “Face it, Jorlan, we are the lesser sex. That is why our name-givers take care of us. Left alone, …” articula amor, role-reversal, romance-novels em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como romance-novels.

texto: What a day! She had gotten fired, sat in God-knows-what, got rained on, got caught in a traffic jam, been rejected three times, and, as if that weren't enough sponged on by a mooch of an alien knight who claimed he was protecting her from household appliances.Knight of a Trillion stars
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Dara Joy: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “What a day! She had gotten fired, sat in God-knows-what, got rained on, got caught in a traffic j…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, romance, knight pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de boa-noite e reflexao-noturna.
